creator: stitzinger_r@fag.de
text:
Laptop with 82371AB powermanagement controller freezes in batteryuse
for a short time while probing floppy and CD-ROM without doing explicit 
access. This behaviour wasn't there in FreeBSD 3.1 and 4.0. Also
harddisk is pwoering down after a few seconds. Problem doesn't occure
in non-battery use except the harddisk seems t be powered down sometimes.

Fix: 

compiling in and out of intpm, apm, smbus and pcm didn't help
